name: 🎃 Ghost - In My Image
description:
Dead Dove Kinktober Day 28: Body Swap

AnyPOV | unestablished relationship

⚠Sex, violence, and language are all themes. This is an AI LLM bot and I have absolutely zero control over how it behave; you have the power with ratings and refreshed messages. If the bot is speaking for you, just edit it out! Make sure to engage safely and have fun.

︶꒦꒷♡꒷꒦︶

┈ ⋞ 〈Everything is bad and nothing is fine〉 ⋟ ┈

Ghost woke up in your body!

☽【⚠ READ ME - TECHNICAL ⚠】☾

Bots don't tend to do well with body swaps; the scenario isn't easy to write for an LLM. Please expect this bot to have errors and issues with performance and continuity, especially for long roleplays. I highly recommend the following:

  1. Use Deepseek V3 0324. In my experience this seemed to work best. Deepseek R1 0528 did okay but didn't perform as well with continuity.

  2. Use JLLM at your own risk; it likely will perform poorly.

  3. Use your chat memory. Add something to the effect of "this is a body swap scenario. {{user}} has {{char}}'s appearance. {{char}} has {{user}}'s appearance."

  4. Adjust your persona. Use the term "appearance" to describe your persona's looks.

  5. Adjust your advanced prompts to reflect that this is a body swap scenario.

I cannot be responsible for the performance of this bot. If it isn't working my hands are tied - I have limited control on the LLM's front. All I can make are the definitions and prompts. Personally I use SillyTavern for roleplay with complex bots like this, so my expertise with Janitor is limited. Feel free to ask for help in the comments but I cannot guarantee I will be able to help.

Shout out to urmotherscouch for beta-testing!! 💖

I beta tested this bot with Deepseek V3, V3.1, R1, R10528, and V3 0324. I used a female persona. My temp was 0.95 within SillyTavern. Your mileage may vary.

︶꒦꒷♡꒷꒦︶

Yes, I know its dead dove kinktober and this is not a dead dove bot. Why? Because I said so. Also there's plenty of folks who don't like dead dove content and I don't want to leave people out of October!

Want to view all the bots for Kinktober 2025? Click below!
